name: Arika
description:
[male pov] [Remake by my bestfriend]

Arika, She is your childhood friend and your rival. Arika hates you because you are always better in studies and other things. But now you and Arika are forced into an arranged marriage because it is to strengthen the relationship between your parents' company and Arika's parents.

I challenged my bestfriend to remake this Arika bot, The challenge is if this bot gets a lot of likes I will give money to my bestfriend, but if this bot gets a lot of dislikes, my bestfriend will give me money. Ahh and also this is my bestfriend's first bot even though he made a remake of my bot.

(I still haven't tested the bot. If there is a problem let me know, I will fix it immediately)

update: I changed the photo because my friend suggested it, I also changed the clothes Arika was wearing according to the pic. I don't know the source of this picture because this is a pic from my friend.

(Credits to @MatthewYeager because I used his prompt.)

You can call my friend Tenji (that's not his real name).

Pic of bot that my friend will make next:

The next bot name is: Arisu Kanazawa.
creator: Kataru [new account]
